product_overview: Arabic-first, subscription SEO content service that markets JBRSEO and captures leads via a public marketing site, with an authenticated admin console for editing site content, pricing, and subscriber data.
core_goals: Convert marketing visitors into leads and subscribers for the 18-month-for-12 content subscription.
Provide an admin console for localized (SA/EG) content, pricing, and SEO settings that update the public site without code changes.
Capture lead contact and plan preference via a lightweight signup surface and persist subscriber metadata for reporting.
Surface subscriber metrics and recent activity in the admin dashboard for transparent reporting.

features.name: Public Marketing Site
features.description: Static and editable landing pages (Arabic-first, country-aware) that present hero, pricing, how-it-works, outcomes, FAQ, and CTAs to drive signup.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll through hero, Why Now, How It Works and outcomes sections -> Click Pricing link in header -> See in-page pricing section (#pricing) on / -> Click primary CTA on a plan -> Navigate to /signup?plan=Growth -> See /signup page with plan visually highlighted

Navigate to / -> Click Pricing link in header -> See in-page pricing section (#pricing) on / -> Click plan CTA -> Navigate to /signup?plan=Starter -> See /signup page where plan query param is advisory -> No plan preselected is visible and user must choose a plan before submitting

features.name: User Signup Flow
features.description: Lightweight marketing signup form that captures required email and phone, optional business name, plan preference, persists the lead, and shows a thank-you page.
user_flows: Navigate to /signup -> Fill email field with a valid email -> Fill phone number field with a valid phone -> Optionally fill business name field -> Select plan option on the page -> Click Submit button -> POST /api/signup -> Navigate to /signup/thank-you -> See confirmation and next steps

Navigate to /signup -> Leave email field empty -> Click Submit button -> See inline validation error indicating email is required -> Fill email field correctly -> Click Submit button -> POST /api/signup -> See confirmation or server error if backend fails

features.name: Admin Authentication
features.description: Password-only admin login that grants access to the authenticated dashboard when the correct shared password is supplied in non-production environments.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/login -> Fill admin password field with 'admin123' -> Click Login button -> POST /api/admin/login -> Redirect to /admin -> See admin dashboard overview
Navigate to /admin/login -> Fill admin password field with an incorrect password -> Click Login button -> POST /api/admin/login -> See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Admin Dashboard and Settings
features.description: Authenticated admin console for managing subscribers, per-country site settings (general, SEO, tracking, images), and content sections (hero, header/footer, emojis, dynamic sections); changes persist via server actions and reflect on the public site.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Click Settings link in dashboard -> Navigate to /admin/settings -> Edit general or tracking form fields -> Click Save -> POST /api/admin/settings -> See success confirmation -> Navigate to / -> See updated content reflected on the public site
Navigate to /admin -> Not authenticated -> Get redirected to /admin/login -> See login form and cannot access dashboard until authenticated

routes.description: Signup page to create an account
Manage subscribers in the admin dashboard
General and tracking settings for the site
Dynamic admin content editor for different sections

features.name: Public Marketing Site
features.description: Static marketing pages presenting JBRSEO, pricing, team, and legal information.
user_interactions: Navigate between public pages via header or footer links
Click primary calls-to-action to go to signup

features.name: User Signup Flow
features.description: Visitors can sign up for JBRSEO and are redirected to a thank-you page.

features.name: Admin Authentication
features.description: Admin users log into the dashboard from a dedicated login page.
user_interactions: Fill admin email and password fields
See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Admin Dashboard and Settings
features.description: Authenticated admins can manage site content, subscribers, and SEO settings.
user_interactions: Edit content in emojis, header, footer, and dynamic sections
